chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Mr. Justice Muhammad Abdul Rehman. C.P.No.D-2957 of 2025 Muhammad Talha & others............. Petitioners Vs. Athar Naeem & others............... Respondents. 10.10.2025. Syed Rashid Rizvi, advocate for petitioners. O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Case of the petitioners is that a decree in suit No.1014/2021 was obtained in respect of the ancestral property by concealing existence of the petitioners, who are also legal heirs of late Manzoor Ahmed. They filed an application u/s 12 CPC against judgment and decree, which was dismissed, and against which a revision application has been filed in which however, no stay has been granted and meanwhile the case has been put up for execution of the judgment and decree. 2. Since against the impugned judgment and decree allegedly obtained through concealment of facts, a revision application is pending before competent court of law, this petition is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. However, petitioners may plead for stay order before revisional court, which may consider the same request keeping in view all the facts and circumstances of the case in accordance with law. The petition is dismissed alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE AK
